item.title: Return of the Meme: 1412 (fridge cigarette)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "bwreeep." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 5) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride

item.title: My Sweet Void Has Gone Over The Rainbow Bridge
item.description:
EDIT: Thank you everyone for the kinds words you have commented. I do appreciate them all. Thank you. I add some links to some other posts I had of Shadow at the end that had photos that weren't in this post. ---- My sweet void Shadow crossed over the Rainbow Bridge today. He was about 17 1/2 years old and was with me through so much. I just hope that he had lived a happy life and knew he was loved so deeply. At his age he had starting having health issues, the main issue like with most cats his kidney failure. He was showing signs some months ago, but was still very mobile and active for a cat his age with no issues eating and a healthy appetite. But he hadn't really been eating much the last 2 days and this morning he was having breathing issues. Rushed him to Med Vet and after some tests found that his kidneys were failing and his body was only producing about 9% of the red blood cells needed. Which had caused him to be anemic and his body was lacking oxygen which resulted in the breathing issues. Vet said anything they did at this point would be very costly and only be a bandaid prolonging the inevitable. I made the decision to have him put down as he was suffering and I didn't want that continue, especially when the treatments would only give him a few weeks, maybe months at best. I had a cat growing up that lived to be 18, and had gone through something similar with kidney failure. My dad didn't want to part with her and spent the money on treatments. The last 3 weeks of that cats life she should have never had to go through as she was miserable. I didn't want that for Shadow and made to difficult decision to let him go. Below are some of my favorite photos of him throughout the years.
This was 1 of the last photos I took of him. Only a week ago. He was my travel buddy on a road trip that I took as my father had passed away. I drove home to my parents house and took him with me as I was going to be there for 2 weeks and didn't have someone to watch him. This photo was on the drive back. I wish I had more photos of him when he was a kitten, but back then I still had a flip phone that didn't have that great of a camera and had a digital camera instead, and never seemed to think to keep near it me all times. I've got a few other shots of him in some older posts as well. My apartment feels so empty now without him here. EDIT: Some of the previous posts I made with pictures of Shadow. https://imgur.com/gallery/heard-was-black-cat-appreciation-day-JLfHrQo https://imgur.com/gallery/abyss-stared-back-LL0GLsV https://imgur.com/gallery/happy-caterday-from-house-panther-shadow-9or2Ck8 https://imgur.com/gallery/void-kUdQWlc https://imgur.com/gallery/void-stares-back-gTAFn86 https://imgur.com/gallery/how-void-looks-knowing-he-gets-to-sleep-all-day-while-i-go-to-work-pPHuw9c https://imgur.com/gallery/fur-goblin-oeS4NHh https://imgur.com/gallery/boy-shadow-being-normal-cat-vOWE0OX https://imgur.com/gallery/bought-void-new-cat-bed-BNTE8TC https://imgur.com/gallery/cat-realized-i-was-taking-his-picture-he-decided-to-pose-wNfXeev https://imgur.com/gallery/bought-heating-pad-void-N7dFHoK https://imgur.com/gallery/nap-time-sun-vHZCDgj https://imgur.com/gallery/poor-boy-has-to-wear-cone-again-kZcYdbu https://imgur.com/gallery/no-mom-cat-isnt-dead-UFgXBQf https://imgur.com/gallery/14-years-with-boy-shadow-0lRs4ks
item.dc:creator: DrSchlepenstein

item.title: Epstein List Rape King at it again
item.description: Roberts’ SCOTUS said it was executive overreach for Biden to forgive student loans but not to wholesale gut the education department with zero contingency plan. Or any plan at all. This is how you downgrade every public school in every town and dismantle the IEP system to help address students with disabilities. Charters won’t take students with special needs. SCOTUS is taking the power of Congress and giving it to the Epstein List Rape King.
item.dc:creator: IliveINyourHEADrentFREE

item.title: Buenos Tardes
item.description:
Look at this kitten. He looks very...innocent, doesn't he?
So adorable.
Just a curious little guy
Wants to know what's going on...
Wait, Frank...
26 seconds of pure chaos for your enjoyment. With sound. I have no idea what he got into, but he's excited about something... I'm headed to the gym. And hopefully that thunderstorm will sail on by.
item.dc:creator: FrankTheKitten

item.title: GovBrief Today - What Happened #164
item.description: The wanna-be emperor has no clothes and people are finally saying it out loud. MAGA is still tearing itself apart over who lied about the Epstein files while Senate documents prove the Secret Service director lied to Congress about denying Trump security. Noem flat-out denies her own agency's paperwork delayed FEMA call centers when flood survivors desperately needed help. Meanwhile, Biden calls Trump and the GOP "liars" while King Charles manages Trump with transparent royal theater. People are bringing receipts to contradict the hollow denials of malfeasance and cruelty. Keep calling out what everyone can see. Start locally. There's an online discussion Tuesday at 4pm ET with the League of Women Voters that should provide good grounding as you prep for Thursday's protests. Meanwhile, don't rely on the algorithm to keep you informed. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you always know what's going on. Add your email at govbrief dot today, on Facebook, or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com 1. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-antisemitism-dc-takeover 2. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-butler-report 3. https://go.govbrief.today/patriot-missiles-ukraine 4. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-uk-visit-september 5. https://go.govbrief.today/noem-denies-phone-problems 6. https://go.govbrief.today/noem-complains-judges-political 7. https://go.govbrief.today/biden-calls-gop-liars Yesterday's Top Story - https://go.govbrief.today/bongino-bondi-epstein-schism Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/lwv-remaking-commons Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.dc:creator: sigirides

item.title: Buenos Dias...
item.description:
Frank, what are you doing?
It's good to see them interacting without a chamber quartet. You know, no violins.
Last night, this guy decided that tiny octopus was the perfect resting spot.
Eventually, he moved and fell asleep here. Frank, buddy. Is that comfortable?
Bonus video of Frank just existing. I love watching his chest rise and fall as he breathes. It's kind of mesmerizing. It's Monday. Hope you have a great day today and take the time to find a small piece of personal joy.
item.dc:creator: FrankTheKitten

item.title: A photo of my dog Panko every day
item.dc:creator: PankoBoy

item.title: Obligatory Landlord & other Rent Seeking Behavior HATE POST.
item.description: Rent is due by the 12th. I try to pay it as early as possible, biweekly checks means we're usually 1-2 weeks early, to avoid fees. So we pay by the 1st, but this month they've sent out an email stating that we must purchase renter's insurance by rent due date. Not even a month's notice? Of course our renters portal has a link to the building owner's preferred insurance policy, but the fee for not providing monthly insurance coverage is the same as the cost of the insurance policy the building owner suggests we opt into. We are already recipients of a subsidized rental voucher but they are literally looking for any way they can nickel & dime is out of every dollar they can force us to pay. We regularly get emails asking us for the remaining rent when the agency doesn't post payment on time. I don't even know if they have to pay by the same day, but we are always immediately contacted. It's not Section 8 but it's through our county. Why rent to us if you are going to harass us every single step of the way? I don't know if we're the only voucher recipients in the building, but I do know that even the single decade long tenant got bullied into a month by month lease. He's always had an annual lease up until the last renewal. They really are willing to do anything to make sure they can get us TFO when they need to flip a unit. Sorry, I just needed to vent. Anyone else need to join the bitch sesh? Happy Monday.
item.dc:creator: EvilFentoozler

Stay fluffy.
